channel.title: Morning Score
channel.description: Delivered every Monday by 10 a.m., Weekly Score is your guide to the year-round campaign cycle.

item.title: Tomorrow’s weirdest primary
item.description: The Nebraska Democratic Party is boosting a candidate in tomorrow’s Senate primary who hopes to never appear on November’s ballot.
item.dc:creator: By Andrew Howard

item.title: Redistricting will continue until morale improves
item.description: Eight states have already enacted new maps ahead of the midterms.
item.dc:creator: By Andrew Howard

item.title: Republicans blame Dems after WHCD
item.description: Republicans are using a playbook they honed after the assassination attempts against Donald Trump
item.dc:creator: By Lisa Kashinsky

item.title: Pennsylvania's Mastriano mayhem
item.description: A campaign to write in Doug Mastriano for Pennsylvania governor is worrying some state Republicans.
item.dc:creator: By Lisa Kashinsky

item.title: Latinos have turned on Trump — but Dems haven't closed the deal
item.description: Just 30 percent of the 1,600 Latino likely voters surveyed across eight battleground states approved of Trump’s handling of the economy.
item.dc:creator: By Andrew Howard

item.title: Turning Point goes down ballot to flex its Arizona muscle
item.description: The grassroots organization founded by the late Charlie Kirk has unleashed its organizers and resources on a little-watched election taking place Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: By Andrew Howard and Samuel Benson
item.dc:contributor: By Andrew Howard and Samuel Benson

item.title: The rich guys self-funding their governor’s races
item.description: This year, four deep-pocketed candidates are trying to self-fund their way to victory.
item.dc:creator: By Andrew Howard

item.title: Takeaways from the latest FEC drop
item.description: Score spent the weekend digging into the top storylines from the March monthly FEC filings.
item.dc:creator: By Andrew Howard

item.title: The VA redistricting fight is heating up
item.description: With early voting ongoing, both campaigns have ramped up their operations in a big way over the past week.
item.dc:creator: By Andrew Howard
